query:
SELECT 
    id, symbol, entry_price, quantity, status, 
    recommendation, confidence, opened_at,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, opened_at, NOW()) as hours_open
FROM trades
WHERE status = 'OPEN'
ORDER BY opened_at ASC;
